name: Spaghetti in Curry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dice or slice all vegetables.
2. Start pasta cooking with oil to keep from sticking. Stir occasionally until ready.
3. Cook potatoes in a small amount of water, stirring occasionally.
4. Saute onions, mushrooms, peppers, and garlic in a small amount of oil; when lightly browned, add 1/4 cup of potato water.
5. Add carrots and boil, stirring frequently. When carrots are soft, remove from heat.
6. Mix milk and flour in a cup, then stir into the vegetables.
7. Drain pasta and add potatoes when just tender.
8. Add spices and cook on medium heat for 1-2 minutes.
9. Turn down the heat and let simmer until the pasta is ready. The sauce will thicken as it continues to cook.
